description: Specialized in mountain terrain traversal and high-altitude navigation
materialRequirements: Stone for mountain lodge, lox pelt rug, forge equipment

tieredBenefits.description: Improved traction, reduced stamina drain when climbing
Better combat stability on slopes, enhanced mobility
Maximum terrain benefits, excellent Mistlands navigation

randomTalk: The thing about mountains is, they're always taller than they look. And they already look tall.
People say the mountain doesn't care. They're wrong. It actively dislikes you.
I've been up peaks so high, even the gods had nosebleeds.
Aye, the altitude does things to your head. I once had a philosophical debate with a stone giant. Lost, too.
A mountain is just a very patient enemy.
Keep yer feet on the ground!
There's gold in them hills! ...Probably. I haven't actually checked.
The secret to climbing is simple: don't look down. Also don't look up. Best not to look at all, really.
Moradin's beard, it's cold up here! ...Who's Moradin? No idea. The altitude, I tell you.
They say every mountain has a heart of stone. Bit redundant, that.
I don't trust flat ground. If it's not trying to kill you, what's it hiding?
Aye, I could do that! ...What were we talking about?
Some folk climb mountains because they're there. I climb them because the things living on them need a good walloping.
You know what rolls downhill? Everything. That's the whole problem.
I've mapped every path on this peak. The mountain moved three of them out of spite.
...I am a dwarf and I'm....something something hole...
randomGreets: Well met! Watch yer step, the rocks are treacherous today.
Hail! You look like someone who appreciates a good altitude.
Ho there! Come to see what real terrain looks like?
Aye, good to see a friendly face. The fenring don't count.
Welcome! Mind the ice, it's got opinions.
You made it up here in one piece? Impressive!
randomGoodbye: Watch yer footing on the way down.
May the mountain be gentle with you. It won't be, but may it anyway.
Keep yer pick sharp and yer wits sharper!
Safe travels! Mind you don't feed the wolves, there's already enough of the buggers.
Off ye go then. I'll be here, might even dig a hole!
